source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A two loop position control system is shown in <image>.

The gain \( K \) of the Tacho-generator influences mainly the:

choice_map.C: Phase shift of the closed-loop transfer function at very low frequencies (\( \omega \rightarrow 0 \))
choice_map.D: Phase shift of the closed-loop transfer function at very high frequencies (\( \omega \rightarrow \infty \))

extraction_notes: image field is an in-memory PIL image object placeholder; no path or URL is available

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'shown in the image'
image_quality_summaries readability_score=0.8891 suggests the diagram is usable
multi_step: the item asks about a component gain K within a two-loop control system, implying diagram interpretation plus control-system reasoning
there are 4 answer choices that require selecting the main influenced property, which involves comparison among alternatives
the problem is multimodal because the system structure is in the image and the target property is asked in text
verifiability: choices are explicitly provided (A-D), so correctness is checkable against a fixed option set
answer_text='Peak overshoot' exactly matches choice A
answer_type='short_text' with a concise canonical answer

decision_reasons: question, answer, and required image assets are all present
asset registry passed with no recorded issues
high image dependency and the image asset exists with usable quality evidence
high verifiability because the answer matches an explicit multiple-choice option
specialized_domain_knowledge is a manageable risk and does not outweigh the otherwise strong, complete sample
